pinpoint.campaign.metricdimension.CfnAbo: Specifies metric-based criteria for including or excluding endpoints from a segment. These criteria derive from custom metrics that you define for endpoints.

pinpoint.campaign.metricdimension.Compar.Description: The operator to use when comparing metric values. Valid values are: `GREATER_THAN`, `LESS_THAN`, `GREATER_THAN_OR_EQUAL`, `LESS_THAN_OR_EQUAL`, and `EQUAL`.
